title: Verify existing implementation of password strength validator
description: The password strength validator was already implemented in src/auth/password-validator.ts with validatePasswordStrength function requiring 8+ chars, uppercase, lowercase, and number. Tests in src/auth/password-validator.test.ts cover all requirements and pass (10/10 tests).
existing_patterns: src/utils/result.ts pattern for Result<T, E> discriminated union for explicit error handling
vitest co-located .test.ts files with describe/it expect syntax
